steps.title: Emphasize the formal difference
steps.content: The notes describe two neon sculptures that share a material but differ in form. Use the Future is a yellow neon sign that spells out a phrase, while Ginger is a pink neon sign forming an abstract squiggle.

steps.title: Keep the contrast central
steps.content: Choice B shifts to neon's broader applications. Choice C is vague about how the sculptures differ, and Choice D focuses on dates and advertising history. Choice A directly contrasts phrase and abstract form while noting the shared neon material in both sculptures from the notes. The answer is A.
